answers: Start painting: acrylic is easiest for beginners — dries fast, water-soluble, and forgiving. Get a basic color set and practice.
Watercolor vs acrylic: watercolor is transparent and delicate, acrylic is opaque and versatile. Acrylic is easier to start with.
Painting tips: start with limited colors (learn to mix), use big brushes first, paint loose, and don't fear mistakes.
Chobi aka tips: basic color set nao, practice koro, YouTube tutorials dekho, ar regular drawing koro. Shobur dhoro!
